name: Review Repos
description: Check PRs, CI runs, and stale branches across all watched repos

steps.action: For each repo in shared/repos.json: run `gh pr list`, `gh run list --limit 5`, and check for branches merged more than 14 days ago. Write a structured report to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'Repo Review Report'.

Read repo review report from inbox. Format into a clear summary with: (1) open PRs needing review, (2) recent CI status, (3) stale branches that could be cleaned up. Send to Anthony via Telegram — propose branch deletions but do NOT delete without explicit approval.
